name: ai-engineering-system
description: The AI Engineering System — 174 reusable skills for planning and building software with AI agents, packaged as installable Claude Code plugins (one per skill pack). The canonical system lives in .ai/; these plugins expose its skills natively.

plugins.name: ai-core
plugins.description: Core orchestration, planning, selection, review, testing, delivery, and audit skills (25). Start here with project-orchestrator.

plugins.name: ai-mobile
plugins.description: React Native / Expo mobile skills (36): foundations, navigation, state, auth, native capabilities, testing, builds, readiness.

plugins.name: ai-web
plugins.description: Web & dashboard skills (26): Next.js/Vite selection, routing, design system, state, forms, auth, dashboards, SEO, testing, deployment.

plugins.name: ai-backend
plugins.description: Backend API skills (30): Express/NestJS selection, API design, validation, auth/authorization, jobs/queues, realtime, webhooks, integrations, testing, deployment.

plugins.name: ai-database
plugins.description: Database skills (15): database & data-layer selection, schema design, migrations, indexing, transactions, concurrency, security, performance, backup/recovery.

plugins.name: ai-testing
plugins.description: Testing skills (14): tool selection, unit/integration/API/contract, E2E (Playwright/Maestro), regression/smoke/visual, test data & environments, coverage audits.

plugins.name: ai-devops
plugins.description: DevOps skills (16): repo strategy, monorepo tooling, Docker, env/secrets, CI/CD, GitHub Actions, deployment, staging, production readiness, monitoring, rollback, incident readiness.

plugins.name: ai-security
plugins.description: Security review skills (12): threat modeling, auth/authorization security, API/web/mobile/database security, secrets & dependency audits, abuse prevention, privacy, security regression testing.
